query: Locate and transcribe all text markings painted on the field's turf. Also explain the significance of the markings.
final_answer: Transcribed the field markings: (552, 164, 645, 186) is labeled 'CONCORDIA' and (583, 337, 660, 356) is labeled 'COUGARS'. Together, these markings read 'CONCORDIA COUGARS', representing the university's team name and mascot, which are painted on the field to designate the home team and promote school spirit.
gt_answer: Transcribed the field markings: 'CONCORDIA' and 'COUGARS'. Together, these markings read 'CONCORDIA COUGARS', representing the university's team name and mascot, which are painted on the field to designate the home team and promote school spirit.
